# my-portfolio
This is my portfolio
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8"/>
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0"/>
<title>MD Sahil | AIML Engineer</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Space+Grotesk:wght@300;400;500;600;700&family=Orbitron:wght@400;700;900&family=Fira+Code:wght@300;400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<style>
*{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box;}
:root{
  --bg:#04060f;
  --bg2:#080d1a;
  --card:#0c1525;
  --accent:#00f5ff;
  --accent2:#bf5af2;
  --accent3:#ff6b35;
  --green:#00ff88;
  --text:#e2e8f8;
  --muted:#5a6a8a;
  --border:rgba(0,245,255,0.12);
}
html{scroll-behavior:smooth;}
body{background:var(--bg);color:var(--text);font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;overflow-x:hidden;cursor:none;}

/* CURSOR */
#cursor{position:fixed;width:12px;height:12px;background:var(--accent);border-radius:50%;pointer-events:none;z-index:9999;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);transition:width .2s,height .2s,background .2s;mix-blend-mode:screen;}
#cursor-ring{position:fixed;width:36px;height:36px;border:1px solid rgba(0,245,255,0.5);border-radius:50%;pointer-events:none;z-index:9998;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);transition:width .2s,height .2s;}

/* PARTICLES */
#particles{position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:0;pointer-events:none;}

/* NAV */
nav{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;z-index:100;padding:1.2rem 5%;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;background:rgba(4,6,15,0.85);backdrop-filter:blur(20px);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);}
.nav-logo{font-family:'Orbitron',monospace;font-size:0.95rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--accent);letter-spacing:0.15em;position:relative;}
.nav-logo::after{content:'';position:absolute;bottom:-4px;left:0;width:100%;height:1px;background:var(--accent);box-shadow:0 0 8px var(--accent);animation:logoLine 3s ease-in-out infinite;}
@keyframes logoLine{0%,100%{width:100%;opacity:1;}50%{width:40%;opacity:0.5;}}
.nav-links{display:flex;gap:2.5rem;}
.nav-links a{font-size:0.78rem;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:0.12em;color:var(--muted);transition:color .2s;position:relative;text-transform:uppercase;text-decoration:none;}
.nav-links a::after{content:'';position:absolute;bottom:-4px;left:0;width:0;height:1px;background:var(--accent);transition:width .3s;box-shadow:0 0 6px var(--accent);}
.nav-links a:hover{color:var(--accent);}
.nav-links a:hover::after{width:100%;}

/* HERO */
.hero{min-height:100vh;display:flex;align-items:center;padding:0 5%;position:relative;gap:5rem;overflow:hidden;}
.hero-bg-text{position:absolute;top:50%;left:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);font-family:'Orbitron',monospace;font-size:clamp(6rem,15vw,14rem);font-weight:900;color:transparent;-webkit-text-stroke:1px rgba(0,245,255,0.04);white-space:nowrap;pointer-events:none;z-index:0;animation:bgFloat 8s ease-in-out infinite;}
@keyframes bgFloat{0%,100%{transform:translate(-50%,-50%) translateY(0);}50%{transform:translate(-50%,-50%) translateY(-20px);}}
.hero-lines{position:absolute;inset:0;overflow:hidden;pointer-events:none;}
.hero-lines span{position:absolute;width:1px;background:linear-gradient(180deg,transparent,var(--accent),transparent);animation:lineDown 4s linear infinite;opacity:0;}
.hero-lines span:nth-child(1){left:15%;animation-delay:0s;height:200px;}
.hero-lines span:nth-child(2){left:35%;animation-delay:1.5s;height:150px;}
.hero-lines span:nth-child(3){left:60%;animation-delay:0.8s;height:250px;}
.hero-lines span:nth-child(4){left:80%;animation-delay:2.2s;height:180px;}
@keyframes lineDown{0%{top:-300px;opacity:0;}20%{opacity:0.6;}80%{opacity:0.6;}100%{top:110%;opacity:0;}}

.hero-content{position:relative;z-index:2;flex:1;animation:heroFadeIn 1s ease forwards;}
@keyframes heroFadeIn{from{opacity:0;transform:translateX(-40px);}to{opacity:1;transform:translateX(0);}}
.hero-eyebrow{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;margin-bottom:1.5rem;}
.eyebrow-line{height:1px;width:40px;background:var(--accent);box-shadow:0 0 8px var(--accent);}
.eyebrow-text{font-family:'Fira Code',monospace;font-size:0.72rem;color:var(--accent);letter-spacing:0.2em;}
.hero h1{font-family:'Orbitron',monospace;font-size:clamp(2.4rem,5vw,4.2rem);font-weight:900;line-height:1.1;margin-bottom:0.5rem;}
.hero h1 .line1{display:block;color:var(--text);}
.hero h1 .line2{display:block;color:var(--accent);text-shadow:0 0 30px rgba(0,245,255,0.4);}
.hero-role{font-family:'Fira Code',monospace;font-size:1rem;color:var(--accent2);margin-bottom:1.5rem;}
.hero-role span{color:var(--muted);}
.type-cursor{animation:blink 1s infinite;}
@keyframes blink{0%,100%{opacity:1;}50%{opacity:0;}}
.hero-desc{font-size:0.95rem;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.9;max-width:480px;margin-bottom:2.5rem;font-family:'Fira Code',monospace;font-weight:300;}
.hero-btns{display:flex;gap:1rem;flex-wrap:wrap;}
.btn-glow{background:transparent;border:1px solid var(--accent);color:var(--accent);padding:0.75rem 2rem;border-radius:4px;font-family:'Orbitron',monospace;font-size:0.72rem;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:0.15em;cursor:pointer;position:relative;overflow:hidden;transition:color .3s;text-decoration:none;display:inline-block;}
.btn-glow::before{content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;background:var(--accent);transform:translateX(-101%);transition:transform .3s ease;z-index:-1;}
.btn-glow:hover{color:#04060f;box-shadow:0 0 24px rgba(0,245,255,0.4);}
.btn-glow:hover::before{transform:translateX(0);}
.btn-solid{background:var(--accent2);border:none;color:#fff;padding:0.75rem 2rem;border-radius:4px;font-family:'Orbitron',monospace;font-size:0.72rem;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:0.15em;cursor:pointer;transition:box-shadow .3s,transform .2s;text-decoration:none;display:inline-block;}
.btn-solid:hover{box-shadow:0 0 24px rgba(191,90,242,0.5);transform:translateY(-2px);}

.status-badge{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;background:rgba(0,255,136,0.08);border:1px solid rgba(0,255,136,0.25);border-radius:100px;padding:6px 14px;font-family:'Fira Code',monospace;font-size:0.7rem;color:var(--green);margin-bottom:1.5rem;}
.status-dot{width:7px;height:7px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--green);box-shadow:0 0 8px var(--green);animation:pulse 2s infinite;}
@keyframes pulse{0%,100%{box-shadow:0 0 8px var(--green);}50%{box-shadow:0 0 16px var(--green),0 0 24px rgba(0,255,136,0.3);}}

/* HERO PHOTO */
.hero-photo-wrap{position:relative;z-index:2;flex-shrink:0;animation:photoIn 1.2s ease forwards;animation-delay:0.3s;opacity:0;}
@keyframes photoIn{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(30px);}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0);}}
.hero-photo-frame{position:relative;width:280px;}
.hero-photo-frame img{width:280px;height:350px;object-fit:cover;object-position:center top;display:block;border-radius:4px;position:relative;z-index:2;}
.frame-corner{position:absolute;width:20px;height:20px;z-index:3;}
.frame-corner.tl{top:-6px;left:-6px;border-top:2px solid var(--accent);border-left:2px solid var(--accent);box-shadow:-2px -2px 10px rgba(0,245,255,0.4);}
.frame-corner.tr{top:-6px;right:-6px;border-top:2px solid var(--accent);border-right:2px solid var(--accent);box-shadow:2px -2px 10px rgba(0,245,255,0.4);}
.frame-corner.bl{bottom:-6px;left:-6px;border-bottom:2px solid var(--accent);border-left:2px solid var(--accent);box-shadow:-2px 2px 10px rgba(0,245,255,0.4);}
.frame-corner.br{bottom:-6px;right:-6px;border-bottom:2px solid var(--accent);border-right:2px solid var(--accent);box-shadow:2px 2px 10px rgba(0,245,255,0.4);}
.photo-scan{position:absolute;left:0;right:0;height:2px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,var(--accent),transparent);z-index:3;animation:scan 3s ease-in-out infinite;box-shadow:0 0 12px var(--accent);}
@keyframes scan{0%{top:0%;opacity:0;}10%{opacity:1;}90%{opacity:1;}100%{top:100%;opacity:0;}}
.hero-photo-glow{position:absolute;inset:-20px;background:radial-gradient(ellipse,rgba(0,245,255,0.08) 0%,transparent 70%);z-index:1;pointer-events:none;}

/* SECTIONS */
section{padding:6rem 5%;position:relative;}
.section-label{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:16px;margin-bottom:0.75rem;}
.section-num{font-family:'Fira Code',monospace;font-size:0.72rem;color:var(--accent2);}
.section-line{flex:1;height:1px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--border),transparent);}
.section-title{font-family:'Orbitron',monospace;font-size:clamp(1.6rem,3vw,2.2rem);font-weight:900;margin-bottom:3rem;letter-spacing:0.02em;}
.section-title .highlight{color:var(--accent);}
.divider{height:1px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,rgba(0,245,255,0.15),transparent);}

/* ABOUT */
.about-layout{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.1fr 1fr;gap:4rem;align-items:start;}
.about-text-block{font-family:'Fira Code',monospace;font-size:0.88rem;color:var(--muted);line-height:2;}
.about-text-block .hl{color:var(--accent);}
.about-text-block p{margin-bottom:1.2rem;}
.about-stats{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:0.8rem;margin-top:1.5rem;}
.stat-card{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:1.2rem;text-align:center;position:relative;overflow:hidden;transition:border-color .3s,transform .3s;}
.stat-card::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:2px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--accent),var(--accent2));transform:scaleX(0);transition:transform .4s;}
.stat-card:hover{border-color:var(--accent);transform:translateY(-3px);}
.stat-card:hover::before{transform:scaleX(1);}
.stat-num{font-family:'Orbitron',monospace;font-size:1.6rem;font-weight:900;color:var(--accent);}
.stat-label{font-family:'Fira Code',monospace;font-size:0.65rem;color:var(--muted);margin-top:4px;letter-spacing:0.1em;}

/* PHOTO GALLERY — FIXED */
.gallery{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;grid-template-rows:auto;gap:1rem;}
.gallery-item{position:relative;overflow:hidden;border-radius:10px;border:1px solid var(--border);}
.gallery-item.wide{grid-column:1/-1;}
/* Each photo takes full portrait shape */
.gallery-item img{
  width:100%;
  height:100%;
  object-fit:cover;
  object-position:center top;
  display:block;
  filter:saturate(0.85) brightness(0.95);
  transition:transform .6s ease, filter .4s ease;
}
.gallery-item:hover img{transform:scale(1.04);filter:saturate(1.15) brightness(1.05);}
/* Fixed heights so full body is visible */
.gallery-item.portrait-1{height:340px;}
.gallery-item.portrait-2{height:340px;}
/* Overlay shimmer */
.gallery-item::before{content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(180deg,transparent 55%,rgba(4,6,15,0.55) 100%);z-index:1;pointer-events:none;}
.gallery-item::after{content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(0,245,255,0.04),transparent 60%);opacity:0;transition:opacity .4s;z-index:2;pointer-events:none;}
.gallery-item:hover::after{opacity:1;}
/* Corner accent on hover */
.gallery-item .g-corner{position:absolute;width:16px;height:16px;z-index:3;opacity:0;transition:opacity .3s;}
.gallery-item .g-corner.gtl{top:8px;left:8px;border-top:2px solid var(--accent);border-left:2px solid var(--accent);}
.gallery-item .g-corner.gbr{bottom:8px;right:8px;border-bottom:2px solid var(--accent);border-right:2px solid var(--accent);}
.gallery-item:hover .g-corner{opacity:1;}

/* SKILLS */
.skills-section{background:linear-gradient(180deg,var(--bg) 0%,var(--bg2) 100%);}
.skills-grid{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:0.9rem;}
.skill-pill{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;padding:0.7rem 1.2rem;font-family:'Fira Code',monospace;font-size:0.82rem;font-weight:400;transition:border-color .3s,transform .3s,box-shadow .3s,color .3s;cursor:default;}
.skill-pill:hover{transform:translateY(-3px);}
.sk-dot{width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;flex-shrink:0;transition:box-shadow .3s;}
.skill-pill.py:hover{border-color:#4f8ef7;color:#4f8ef7;}
.skill-pill.cpp:hover{border-color:#38d9b2;color:#38d9b2;}
.skill-pill.flask:hover{border-color:#f7c94f;color:#f7c94f;}
.skill-pill.html:hover{border-color:#ff6b35;color:#ff6b35;}
.skill-pill.ml:hover{border-color:#bf5af2;color:#bf5af2;}
.skill-pill.api:hover{border-color:#38d9b2;color:#38d9b2;}
.skill-pill.pm:hover{border-color:#00f5ff;color:#00f5ff;}
.skill-pill.git:hover{border-color:#f7c94f;color:#f7c94f;}

/* PROJECTS */
.projects-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(270px,1fr));gap:1.2rem;}
.project-card{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:1.75rem;position:relative;overflow:hidden;transition:border-color .3s,transform .3s;cursor:default;}
.project-card::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:-100%;width:100%;height:100%;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,rgba(0,245,255,0.03),transparent);transition:left .5s;}
.project-card:hover::before{left:100%;}
.project-card:hover{border-color:rgba(0,245,255,0.35);transform:translateY(-5px);box-shadow:0 16px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.4),0 0 20px rgba(0,245,255,0.06);}
.proj-header{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-start;margin-bottom:1rem;}
.proj-num{font-family:'Fira Code',monospace;font-size:0.65rem;color:var(--accent2);letter-spacing:0.15em;}
.proj-icon{width:32px;height:32px;border-radius:6px;background:rgba(0,245,255,0.08);border:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:14px;}
.proj-title{font-family:'Orbitron',monospace;font-size:0.88rem;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:0.6rem;letter-spacing:0.02em;}
.proj-desc{font-family:'Fira Code',monospace;font-size:0.8rem;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.8;}
.proj-tags{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:6px;margin-top:1.2rem;}
.ptag{background:rgba(0,245,255,0.06);border:1px solid rgba(0,245,255,0.15);border-radius:3px;padding:3px 10px;font-size:0.65rem;color:var(--accent);font-family:'Fira Code',monospace;letter-spacing:0.08em;}
.proj-glow{position:absolute;bottom:-40px;right:-40px;width:120px;height:120px;background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(0,245,255,0.06),transparent);pointer-events:none;}

/* CONTACT */
.contact-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:4rem;align-items:start;}
.contact-intro{font-family:'Fira Code',monospace;font-size:0.88rem;color:var(--muted);line-height:2;margin-bottom:2rem;}
.contact-intro .hl{color:var(--accent);}
.contact-links{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0.85rem;}
.contact-link{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:1rem;background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:1rem 1.25rem;transition:border-color .3s,transform .3s,box-shadow .3s;text-decoration:none;color:inherit;position:relative;overflow:hidden;}
.contact-link::before{content:'';position:absolute;left:0;top:0;bottom:0;width:3px;background:var(--accent);transform:scaleY(0);transition:transform .3s;}
.contact-link:hover{border-color:rgba(0,245,255,0.3);transform:translateX(8px);box-shadow:0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);}
.contact-link:hover::before{transform:scaleY(1);}
.link-icon{width:38px;height:38px;border-radius:7px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-family:'Orbitron',monospace;font-size:0.6rem;font-weight:700;flex-shrink:0;letter-spacing:0.05em;border:1px solid var(--border);}
.link-label{font-family:'Fira Code',monospace;font-size:0.65rem;color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:0.1em;}
.link-value{font-size:0.88rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--text);}
.contact-terminal{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:1.5rem;font-family:'Fira Code',monospace;font-size:0.8rem;}
.term-bar{display:flex;gap:6px;margin-bottom:1.2rem;}
.term-dot{width:10px;height:10px;border-radius:50%;}
.term-line{margin-bottom:0.5rem;color:var(--muted);}
.term-line .cmd{color:var(--accent);}
.term-line .out{color:var(--green);}
.term-line .out2{color:var(--accent2);}
.term-cursor-line{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;color:var(--accent);margin-top:0.75rem;}

footer{border-top:1px solid var(--border);padding:2rem 5%;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;}
.footer-logo{font-family:'Orbitron',monospace;font-size:0.75rem;color:var(--accent);letter-spacing:0.15em;}
.footer-copy{font-family:'Fira Code',monospace;font-size:0.7rem;color:var(--muted);}

.reveal{opacity:0;transform:translateY(30px);transition:opacity 0.7s ease,transform 0.7s ease;}
.reveal.visible{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0);}

@media(max-width:800px){
  .hero{flex-direction:column-reverse;padding-top:7rem;padding-bottom:3rem;gap:2.5rem;}
  .hero-photo-frame img{width:220px;height:280px;}
  .hero-photo-frame{width:220px;}
  .about-layout,.contact-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
  .gallery{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;}
  .gallery-item.portrait-1,.gallery-item.portrait-2{height:260px;}
  footer{flex-direction:column;gap:0.6rem;text-align:center;}
  .nav-links{gap:1.5rem;}
}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<div id="cursor"></div>
<div id="cursor-ring"></div>
<canvas id="particles"></canvas>

<nav>
  <div class="nav-logo">MD.SAHIL</div>
  <div class="nav-links">
    <a href="#about">About</a>
    <a href="#skills">Skills</a>
    <a href="#projects">Projects</a>
    <a href="#contact">Contact</a>
  </div>
</nav>

<!-- HERO -->
<section class="hero" id="home">
  <div class="hero-bg-text">AIML</div>
  <div class="hero-lines"><span></span><span></span><span></span><span></span></div>
  <div class="hero-content">
    <div class="status-badge"><span class="status-dot"></span>Available for Internships</div>
    <div class="hero-eyebrow"><span class="eyebrow-line"></span><span class="eyebrow-text">PORTFOLIO_v2025</span></div>
    <h1>
      <span class="line1">MD SAHIL</span>
      <span class="line2">AIML ENGINEER</span>
    </h1>
    <div class="hero-role"><span>&gt; </span><span id="typed"></span><span class="type-cursor">|</span></div>
    <p class="hero-desc">// B.Tech 2nd Year · AI &amp; Machine Learning<br/>Building intelligent systems,<br/>one model at a time.</p>
    <div class="hero-btns">
      <a class="btn-glow" href="#projects">VIEW_PROJECTS</a>
      <a class="btn-solid" href="#contact">GET_IN_TOUCH</a>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="hero-photo-wrap">
    <div class="hero-photo-glow"></div>
    <div class="hero-photo-frame">
      <div class="photo-scan"></div>
      <div class="frame-corner tl"></div><div class="frame-corner tr"></div>
      <div class="frame-corner bl"></div><div class="frame-corner br"></div>
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="MD Sahil"/>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<div class="divider"></div>

<!-- ABOUT -->
<section id="about">
  <div class="reveal">
    <div class="section-label"><span class="section-num">01 //</span><div class="section-line"></div></div>
    <div class="section-title">ABOUT <span class="highlight">ME</span></div>
  </div>
  <div class="about-layout reveal">
    <div>
      <div class="about-text-block">
        <p>Hey! I'm <span class="hl">MD Sahil</span>, a passionate second-year B.Tech student specialising in <span class="hl">Artificial Intelligence &amp; Machine Learning</span> from Bhopal, India.</p>
        <p>I love turning ideas into reality through code — from building <span class="hl">Flask backends</span> and REST APIs to experimenting with <span class="hl">Python automation</span> and machine learning models.</p>
        <p>Currently exploring the intersection of AI and software engineering, always looking for new challenges to sharpen my skills.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="about-stats">
        <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-num">2nd</div><div class="stat-label">// YEAR_B.TECH</div></div>
        <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-num">3+</div><div class="stat-label">// PROJECTS_BUILT</div></div>
        <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-num">AIML</div><div class="stat-label">// SPECIALISATION</div></div>
        <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-num">OPEN</div><div class="stat-label">// TO_COLLAB</div></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <!-- GALLERY: two portrait photos side by side, full body visible -->
    <div class="gallery">
      <div class="gallery-item portrait-1">
        <div class="g-corner gtl"></div><div class="g-corner gbr"></div>
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="MD Sahil at Sanchi Stupa"/>
      </div>
      <div class="gallery-item portrait-2">
        <div class="g-corner gtl"></div><div class="g-corner gbr"></div>
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="MD Sahil at Cinema"/>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<div class="divider"></div>

<!-- SKILLS -->
<section id="skills" class="skills-section">
  <div class="reveal">
    <div class="section-label"><span class="section-num">02 //</span><div class="section-line"></div></div>
    <div class="section-title">TECH <span class="highlight">STACK</span></div>
  </div>
  <div class="skills-grid reveal">
    <div class="skill-pill py"><span class="sk-dot" style="background:#4f8ef7;"></span>Python</div>
    <div class="skill-pill cpp"><span class="sk-dot" style="background:#38d9b2;"></span>C / C++</div>
    <div class="skill-pill flask"><span class="sk-dot" style="background:#f7c94f;"></span>Flask</div>
    <div class="skill-pill html"><span class="sk-dot" style="background:#ff6b35;"></span>HTML</div>
    <div class="skill-pill ml"><span class="sk-dot" style="background:#bf5af2;"></span>Machine Learning</div>
    <div class="skill-pill api"><span class="sk-dot" style="background:#38d9b2;"></span>REST APIs</div>
    <div class="skill-pill pm"><span class="sk-dot" style="background:#00f5ff;"></span>Postman</div>
    <div class="skill-pill git"><span class="sk-dot" style="background:#f7c94f;"></span>Git &amp; GitHub</div>
  </div>
</section>

<div class="divider"></div>

<!-- PROJECTS -->
<section id="projects">
  <div class="reveal">
    <div class="section-label"><span class="section-num">03 //</span><div class="section-line"></div></div>
    <div class="section-title">MY <span class="highlight">PROJECTS</span></div>
  </div>
  <div class="projects-grid reveal">
    <div class="project-card">
      <div class="proj-header"><div class="proj-num">PROJECT_01</div><div class="proj-icon">📊</div></div>
      <div class="proj-title">Weekly Progress Report Maker</div>
      <div class="proj-desc">A web app that generates and manages structured weekly progress reports — saving time and improving consistency for users.</div>
      <div class="proj-tags"><span class="ptag">Python</span><span class="ptag">Flask</span><span class="ptag">HTML</span></div>
      <div class="proj-glow"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="project-card">
      <div class="proj-header"><div class="proj-num">PROJECT_02</div><div class="proj-icon">⚡</div></div>
      <div class="proj-title">Flask CRUD API</div>
      <div class="proj-desc">Full CRUD REST API built with Flask, tested &amp; documented with Postman. A solid foundation for scalable backend development.</div>
      <div class="proj-tags"><span class="ptag">Flask</span><span class="ptag">REST API</span><span class="ptag">Postman</span></div>
      <div class="proj-glow"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="project-card">
      <div class="proj-header"><div class="proj-num">PROJECT_03</div><div class="proj-icon">🐍</div></div>
      <div class="proj-title">Python Mini Projects</div>
      <div class="proj-desc">A collection of Python scripts exploring automation, algorithms, and problem-solving — the building blocks of my programming journey.</div>
      <div class="proj-tags"><span class="ptag">Python</span><span class="ptag">Automation</span><span class="ptag">Algorithms</span></div>
      <div class="proj-glow"></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<div class="divider"></div>

<!-- CONTACT -->
<section id="contact">
  <div class="reveal">
    <div class="section-label"><span class="section-num">04 //</span><div class="section-line"></div></div>
    <div class="section-title">GET IN <span class="highlight">TOUCH</span></div>
  </div>
  <div class="contact-grid reveal">
    <div>
      <p class="contact-intro">I'm open to <span class="hl">internships</span>, <span class="hl">collaborations</span>, or just a good tech conversation. Let's build something amazing together.</p>
      <div class="contact-links">
        <a class="contact-link" href="mailto:mdsahil880999@gmail.com">
          <div class="link-icon" style="background:rgba(0,245,255,0.08);color:var(--accent);">✉</div>
          <div><div class="link-label">// EMAIL</div><div class="link-value">mdsahil880999@gmail.com</div></div>
        </a>
        <a class="contact-link" href="https://github.com/sahil8809" target="_blank">
          <div class="link-icon" style="background:rgba(0,255,136,0.08);color:var(--green);font-family:'Orbitron',monospace;font-size:0.55rem;">GH</div>
          <div><div class="link-label">// GITHUB</div><div class="link-value">github.com/sahil8809</div></div>
        </a>
        <a class="contact-link" href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/md-sahil-2233a1331" target="_blank">
          <div class="link-icon" style="background:rgba(191,90,242,0.08);color:var(--accent2);font-family:'Orbitron',monospace;font-size:0.6rem;">in</div>
          <div><div class="link-label">// LINKEDIN</div><div class="link-value">md-sahil-2233a1331</div></div>
        </a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="contact-terminal">
      <div class="term-bar">
        <div class="term-dot" style="background:#ff5f57;"></div>
        <div class="term-dot" style="background:#febc2e;"></div>
        <div class="term-dot" style="background:#28c840;"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="term-line"><span class="cmd">$ </span>whoami</div>
      <div class="term-line"><span class="out">md_sahil // aiml_engineer</span></div>
      <div class="term-line">&nbsp;</div>
      <div class="term-line"><span class="cmd">$ </span>cat skills.txt</div>
      <div class="term-line"><span class="out2">python, c++, flask, html</span></div>
      <div class="term-line"><span class="out2">machine_learning, rest_api</span></div>
      <div class="term-line">&nbsp;</div>
      <div class="term-line"><span class="cmd">$ </span>echo $STATUS</div>
      <div class="term-line"><span class="out">open_to_opportunities=true</span></div>
      <div class="term-line">&nbsp;</div>
      <div class="term-cursor-line"><span>$ </span><span id="term-typed"></span><span class="type-cursor">_</span></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<footer>
  <div class="footer-logo">MD.SAHIL // 2025</div>
  <div class="footer-copy">Built with passion · Bhopal, India 🇮🇳</div>
</footer>

<script>
// CURSOR
const cursor=document.getElementById('cursor'),ring=document.getElementById('cursor-ring');
let mx=0,my=0,rx=0,ry=0;
document.addEventListener('mousemove',e=>{mx=e.clientX;my=e.clientY;cursor.style.left=mx+'px';cursor.style.top=my+'px';});
function animRing(){rx+=(mx-rx)*0.12;ry+=(my-ry)*0.12;ring.style.left=rx+'px';ring.style.top=ry+'px';requestAnimationFrame(animRing);}
animRing();
document.querySelectorAll('a,button,.project-card,.skill-pill').forEach(el=>{
  el.addEventListener('mouseenter',()=>{cursor.style.width='20px';cursor.style.height='20px';ring.style.width='52px';ring.style.height='52px';});
  el.addEventListener('mouseleave',()=>{cursor.style.width='12px';cursor.style.height='12px';ring.style.width='36px';ring.style.height='36px';});
});

// PARTICLES
const canvas=document.getElementById('particles'),ctx=canvas.getContext('2d');
canvas.width=window.innerWidth;canvas.height=window.innerHeight;
window.addEventListener('resize',()=>{canvas.width=window.innerWidth;canvas.height=window.innerHeight;});
const pts=Array.from({length:80},()=>({x:Math.random()*canvas.width,y:Math.random()*canvas.height,vx:(Math.random()-.5)*.3,vy:(Math.random()-.5)*.3,r:Math.random()*1.5+.5}));
function drawP(){
  ctx.clearRect(0,0,canvas.width,canvas.height);
  pts.forEach(p=>{p.x+=p.vx;p.y+=p.vy;if(p.x<0||p.x>canvas.width)p.vx*=-1;if(p.y<0||p.y>canvas.height)p.vy*=-1;ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(p.x,p.y,p.r,0,Math.PI*2);ctx.fillStyle='rgba(0,245,255,0.25)';ctx.fill();});
  pts.forEach((a,i)=>pts.slice(i+1).forEach(b=>{const d=Math.hypot(a.x-b.x,a.y-b.y);if(d<120){ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(a.x,a.y);ctx.lineTo(b.x,b.y);ctx.strokeStyle=`rgba(0,245,255,${(1-d/120)*.07})`;ctx.stroke();}}));
  requestAnimationFrame(drawP);
}
drawP();

// TYPEWRITER
const phrases=['python_developer','aiml_engineer','flask_backend_dev','problem_solver'];
let pi=0,ci=0,del=false;
const typedEl=document.getElementById('typed');
function tw(){const cur=phrases[pi];if(!del){typedEl.textContent=cur.slice(0,ci+1);ci++;if(ci===cur.length){del=true;setTimeout(tw,1800);return;}}else{typedEl.textContent=cur.slice(0,ci-1);ci--;if(ci===0){del=false;pi=(pi+1)%phrases.length;}}setTimeout(tw,del?60:90);}
tw();

// TERMINAL TYPER
const tPhrases=['contact --me','hire --sahil','connect --now'];
let tpi=0,tci=0,tdel=false;
const termEl=document.getElementById('term-typed');
function ttw(){const cur=tPhrases[tpi];if(!tdel){termEl.textContent=cur.slice(0,tci+1);tci++;if(tci===cur.length){tdel=true;setTimeout(ttw,1500);return;}}else{termEl.textContent=cur.slice(0,tci-1);tci--;if(tci===0){tdel=false;tpi=(tpi+1)%tPhrases.length;}}setTimeout(ttw,tdel?50:80);}
ttw();

// SCROLL REVEAL
const obs=new IntersectionObserver(entries=>entries.forEach(e=>{if(e.isIntersecting)e.target.classList.add('visible');}),{threshold:0.12});
document.querySelectorAll('.reveal').forEach(el=>obs.observe(el));

// SMOOTH SCROLL
document.querySelectorAll('a[href^="#"]').forEach(a=>{a.addEventListener('click',e=>{e.preventDefault();const t=document.querySelector(a.getAttribute('href'));if(t)t.scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth'});});});
</script>
</body>
</html>
